creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
ports category: japanese

this update is tk8.0.3jp1.1 -> tk8.0.3jp1.1-fix1.
following bugs are fixed:
    (bug fix) Entry binding didn't work properly in XIM session.
    (bug fix) Widget path name that have kanji could not be parsed
    when internal kanji code is JIS.

Fix: please apply following patch.
This patch was contributed by NABETANI Masaki <nabe@ksj.mcu.or.jp>.
Thanks.

How-To-Repeat: eval following script.

kanji internalcode JIS
label .SOME_JAPANESE_STRING_IN_JISCODE -text "foo"
pack .SOME_JAPANESE_STRING_IN_JISCODE
